debug_info.goal:
k n : ℕ
⊢ ↑(n.choose k) ≤ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ∧ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ≤ ↑n ^ k / 2 ^ (k - 1)

failed_attempts:
constructor
  · exact_mod_cast (Nat.choose_le_div_factorial n k)
  · rcases k with (_ | _ | k) <;> simp_all [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
    all_goals
      apply le_of_sub_nonneg
      field_simp
      ring_nf
      positivity

constructor
  · exact (by
      induction' k with k ih

        · simp [Nat.choose_eq_zero_of_lt]

          apply le_of_sub_nonneg
          field_simp
          ring_nf
          positivity)
  · exact (by
      induction' k with k ih
      · simp
      · cases k
        · simp [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.pow_succ]
        · simp_all [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
          apply le_of_sub_nonneg
          field_simp
          ring_nf
          positivity)
